metadata.description: Governed second brain — redacted Claude Code session notes into Cortex.

plugins.name: second-brain-capture
plugins.description: Captures redacted Claude Code session activity and pushes one curated note per session into a Cortex knowledge base. Redaction is proxied through Cortex (OAuth) to a private AxonFlow agent, so capture works off-VPN; only redacted notes reach Cortex.
